plugin.name: PortalValue
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Find the closest saved portal + speedwalk to your room, and catalog your portals by type.

muclient.script:
require "serialize"
local MAPPER_ID = "b6eae87ccedd84f510b74714" local GMCP_ID = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264"
-- theme colours local C = { hdr="@x099", val="@x045", num="@W", ok="@x048", bad="@R" }
-- colour output (fall back to plain text if the colour lib isn't available) local have_colors = pcall(require, "aardwolf_colors") function pv_echo(s) if have_colors then AnsiNote(ColoursToANSI(s)) else Note((s:gsub("@x%d%d?%d?", ""):gsub("@%a", ""))) end end local echo = pv_echo -- PortalDex code calls echo()
local function esc(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("@", "@@")) end local function q(s) return "'" .. tostring(s):gsub("'", "''") .. "'" end
-- locate the mapper's sqlite db (adapts to whatever world/char/install we're in) local function get_db_path() if not IsPluginInstalled(MAPPER_ID) then return nil, "the Aardwolf GMCP mapper plugin is not installed" end local db_name = GetPluginVariable(MAPPER_ID, "db_name") if not db_name or db_name == "" then db_name = (WorldName() or ""):gsub("[^%w%s()_-]", ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end if db_name == "" then return nil, "could not determine the mapper's database name" end local path = GetInfo(66) .. db_name .. ".db" local f = io.open(path, "rb") if not f then return nil, "database file not found at: " .. path end f:close() return path end
local CARDINALS = { n=true, s=true, e=true, w=true, u=true, d=true }
-- turn an ordered list of step commands into a compressed speedwalk + a move count local function build_speedwalk(dirs) local segs, run = {}, {} local moves = 0 local function flush() if #run > 0 then local parts = {} for _, rc in ipairs(run) do parts[#parts+1] = ((rc.c > 1) and rc.c or "") .. rc.d end segs[#segs+1] = "run " .. table.concat(parts) run = {} end end for _, d in ipairs(dirs) do moves = moves + 1 if CARDINALS[d] then local last = run[#run] if last and last.d == d then last.c = last.c + 1 else run[#run+1] = { d = d, c = 1 } end else flush() segs[#segs+1] = d end end flush() return table.concat(segs, ";"), moves end
local function recall_line(rooms, sw, msg) if rooms ~= nil then if rooms == 0 then return C.hdr .. "Recall walk : " .. C.val .. "you're standing on recall" end return C.hdr .. "Recall walk : " .. C.num .. rooms .. C.hdr .. " rooms (no portals) " .. C.ok .. (sw ~= "" and esc(sw) or "") end return C.hdr .. "Recall walk : " .. C.hdr .. "(" .. esc(msg or "unknown") .. ")" end
-- ========================================================================= -- =============== CATALOG (formerly the PortalDex plugin) =============== -- =========================================================================
-- catalog[idnumber] = { id, name, kw, ptype, restrung, leads, found, level, t, refs } catalog = catalog or {} pd_bag = pd_bag or "" -- portal container keyword if pd_auto == nil then pd_auto = true end -- catalog-as-you-go on/off scan_active = false -- a scan is running? scan_queue = scan_queue or {} pd_speed = pd_speed or 2.0 -- seconds between scan steps scan_mode = nil -- "missing" => auto-repeat scan_pass_start = 0 pd_scan_current_ref = "" -- ref being scanned right now
-- ---- catalog persistence: own file (survives reinstalls) ---- local function pd_datafile() return GetInfo(66) .. "PortalDex_data.lua" end
local function pd_save() local path = pd_datafile() local tmp = path .. ".tmp" local f = io.open(tmp, "w") if not f then return end f:write("return " .. serialize.save_simple({ catalog = catalog, bag = pd_bag, auto = pd_auto, speed = pd_speed })) f:close() os.remove(path) os.rename(tmp, path) end
local function pd_read_table(path) local f = io.open(path, "r") if not f then return nil end local content = f:read("*a"); f:close() if not content or content == "" then return nil end local ok, data = pcall(function() return assert(loadstring(content))() end) if ok and type(data) == "table" then return data end return nil end
local function pd_load() local data = pd_read_table(pd_datafile()) or pd_read_table(pd_datafile() .. ".tmp") if data then if type(data.catalog) == "table" then catalog = data.catalog end pd_bag = data.bag or pd_bag if data.auto ~= nil then pd_auto = data.auto end if tonumber(data.speed) then pd_speed = tonumber(data.speed) end end end
-- ---- id-box capture ---- local in_block = false local buf = {}
function pd_border() if in_block then in_block = false; pd_parse(buf) else in_block = true; buf = {} end end
function pd_line(name, line, wc) if in_block then buf[#buf+1] = wc[1] end end
local function classify(kw, flagset, found) kw = (kw or ""):lower() found = (found or ""):lower() local chaos = (flagset["nosac"] and flagset["nosteal"]) or kw:find("chaos portal", 1, true) if chaos then if flagset["precious"] or kw:find("golden", 1, true) then return "golden chaos" end return "chaos" end if kw:find("trivia", 1, true) then return "trivia" end if found == "a bad trip" then return "trivia" end return "gameload" end
function pd_parse(lines) local f, cur = {}, nil for _, raw in ipairs(lines) do local label = raw:match("^%s*([%a][%a%s']-)%s*:") if label and not raw:match("^%s*:") then local val = raw:match(":%s*(.-)%s*$") or "" label = label:gsub("%s+$",""):gsub("%s+"," ") f[label] = val cur = label else local cont = raw:match("^%s*:%s*(.-)%s*$") if cont and cur then f[cur] = (f[cur] or "") .. ", " .. cont end end end
if not (f["Id"] and f["Type"]) then return end if not f["Type"]:match("[Pp]ortal") then return end if not pd_auto and not scan_active then return end
local id = (f["Id"] or ""):match("%d+") if not id then return end
local flagset = {} for w in (f["Flags"] or ""):gmatch("[%w%-]+") do flagset[w:lower()] = true end
local level = (f["Type"] or ""):match("Level%s*:%s*(%d+)") or "?" local kw = f["Keywords"] or "" local existing = catalog[id] local rec = { id = id, name = f["Name"] or "?", kw = kw, ptype = classify(kw, flagset, f["Found at"]), restrung = flagset["restrung"] and true or false, leads = f["Leads to"] or "?", found = f["Found at"] or "?", level = level, t = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), refs = (existing and existing.refs) or {}, } if scan_active and pd_scan_current_ref ~= "" then rec.refs[pd_scan_current_ref] = true end
local isnew = (existing == nil) catalog[id] = rec pd_save()
if isnew then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] +"..C.ok..esc(rec.ptype)..C.hdr..(rec.restrung and " "..C.val.."(restrung)" or "") .." "..C.val..esc(rec.name).." "..C.num.."("..id..")"..C.hdr.." -> "..C.val..esc(rec.leads)) end end
local function count_types() local counts, total, restrung = {}, 0, 0 for _, r in pairs(catalog) do counts[r.ptype] = (counts[r.ptype] or 0) + 1 total = total + 1 if r.restrung then restrung = restrung + 1 end end return counts, total, restrung end
function pd_summary() local counts, total, restrung = count_types() echo(C.hdr.."============= "..C.num.."PortalDex"..C.hdr.." =============") if total == 0 then echo(C.val.."No portals cataloged yet. 'id' a portal (or run "..C.ok.."portaldex scan"..C.val..").") return end for _, ty in ipairs({"golden chaos","chaos","trivia","gameload"}) do if counts[ty] then echo(C.hdr.." "..C.ok..string.format("%-14s", ty)..C.num..counts[ty]); counts[ty] = nil end end for ty, n in pairs(counts) do echo(C.hdr.." "..C.ok..string.format("%-14s", ty)..C.num..n) end echo(C.hdr.." "..C.val..string.format("%-14s","(restrung)")..C.num..restrung) echo(C.hdr.." "..C.val..string.format("%-14s","total")..C.num..total) echo(C.hdr.."Use "..C.ok.."portaldex list"..C.hdr.." to see them all.") end
function pd_list(name, line, wc) local filter = wc and wc[1] and wc[1]:lower() or nil local arr = {} for _, r in pairs(catalog) do arr[#arr+1] = r end table.sort(arr, function(a,b) if a.ptype ~= b.ptype then return a.ptype < b.ptype end return (a.name or "") < (b.name or "") end) local shown = 0 echo(C.hdr.."============= "..C.num.."PortalDex list"..C.hdr.." =============") for _, r in ipairs(arr) do local hay = (r.ptype.." "..r.name.." "..r.leads):lower() if (not filter) or hay:find(filter, 1, true) then echo(C.ok..string.format("%-13s", r.ptype)..(r.restrung and C.bad.."R " or " ") ..C.val..esc(r.name).." "..C.num.."("..r.id..")"..C.hdr.." -> "..C.val..esc(r.leads) ..C.hdr.." lvl "..C.num..esc(r.level)) shown = shown + 1 end end echo(C.hdr.."("..C.num..shown..C.hdr.." shown"..(filter and (", filter '"..esc(wc[1]).."'") or "")..")") end
function pd_clear() catalog = {} pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Catalog cleared.") end
-- remove one portal from the catalog, by item id (exact) or by name text (one match) function pd_remove(name, line, wc) local arg = ((wc and wc[1]) or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Usage: "..C.ok.."portaldex remove <item id | name>"..C.hdr..". (ids show in "..C.ok.."portaldex list"..C.hdr..".)") return end if arg:match("^%d+$") and catalog[arg] then local nm = catalog[arg].name or "?" catalog[arg] = nil pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Removed "..C.val..esc(nm).." "..C.num.."("..arg..")"..C.hdr.." from the catalog.") return end local low = arg:lower() local matches = {} for id, e in pairs(catalog) do local hay = ((e.name or "").." "..(e.ptype or "").." "..(e.leads or "")):lower() if hay:find(low, 1, true) then matches[#matches+1] = { id = id, e = e } end end if #matches == 0 then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] No cataloged portal matches "..C.val.."'"..esc(arg).."'"..C.hdr..".") elseif #matches == 1 then local m = matches[1] catalog[m.id] = nil pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Removed "..C.val..esc(m.e.name or "?").." "..C.num.."("..m.id..")"..C.hdr.." from the catalog.") else echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] "..C.num..#matches..C.hdr.." matches — remove by id with "..C.ok.."portaldex remove <id>"..C.hdr..":") for _, m in ipairs(matches) do echo(" "..C.val..esc(m.e.name or "?").." "..C.num.."("..m.id..")"..C.hdr.." ["..C.ok..esc(m.e.ptype or "?")..C.hdr.."]") end end end
function pd_speed_cmd(name, line, wc) local n = tonumber(wc and wc[1]) if not n then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan speed: "..C.num..pd_speed..C.hdr.."s per portal. Set with "..C.ok.."portaldex speed <seconds>"..C.hdr..".") return end if n < 0.5 then n = 0.5 elseif n > 10 then n = 10 end pd_speed = n; pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan speed set to "..C.num..pd_speed..C.hdr.."s per portal.") end
function pd_auto_cmd(name, line, wc) local arg = ((wc and wc[1]) or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$",""):lower() if arg == "on" then pd_auto = true elseif arg == "off" then pd_auto = false elseif arg == "" then pd_auto = not pd_auto else echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Use "..C.ok.."portaldex auto on|off"..C.hdr..".") return end pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Catalog-as-you-go is "..(pd_auto and (C.ok.."ON") or (C.bad.."OFF")) ..C.hdr..(pd_auto and "." or " — manual id's won't be saved (scans still catalog).")) end
function pd_bag_cmd(name, line, wc) local arg = (wc and wc[1] or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if arg == "" then if pd_bag == "" then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] No portal container set; scans use each command's own container.") else echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Portal container keyword: "..C.val..esc(pd_bag)) end echo(C.hdr.."Set with "..C.ok.."portaldex bag <keyword>"..C.hdr..", clear with "..C.ok.."portaldex bag none"..C.hdr..".") return end if arg:lower() == "none" or arg:lower() == "clear" then pd_bag = ""; pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Portal container cleared; scans will use each command's container.") return end pd_bag = arg; pd_save() echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Portal container set to "..C.val..esc(pd_bag)..C.hdr..". Scans will take/put using this bag.") end
-- Pull the item reference (and container) from a portal command: the LAST visible -- id number or keyword used in a take/get (dungeon portals take a first-room portal, -- nod, then take the real one). Normal portals have one take, so last == only. local function extract_ref(cmd) cmd = cmd or "" local lastref, lastcont for seg in (cmd .. ";"):gmatch("([^;]*);") do local ref, cont = seg:match("^%s*[tT]ake%s+([^%s;]+)%s+([^%s;]+)") if not ref then ref, cont = seg:match("^%s*[gG]et%s+([^%s;]+)%s+([^%s;]+)") end if not ref then ref = seg:match("^%s*[tT]ake%s+([^%s;]+)") or seg:match("^%s*[gG]et%s+([^%s;]+)") end if ref then lastref, lastcont = ref, cont end end return lastref, lastcont end
local function tcount(t) local n=0 for _ in pairs(t) do n=n+1 end return n end
local function build_ref_index() local idx = {} for id, e in pairs(catalog) do if e.refs then for r in pairs(e.refs) do idx[r] = id end end end return idx end
local function resolve_ref(ref, idx) ref = (ref or ""):lower() if ref == "" then return nil end if idx[ref] then return idx[ref] end if ref:match("^%d+$") and catalog[ref] then return ref end for id, e in pairs(catalog) do for w in (e.kw or ""):gmatch("%S+") do w = w:lower() if w == ref or (#ref < #w and w:sub(1, #ref) == ref) then return id end end end return nil end
local function make_cataloged_checker() local idx = build_ref_index() return function(ref) return resolve_ref(ref, idx) ~= nil end end
local function cross_reference() local path, why = get_db_path() if not path then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] "..esc(why or "no mapper db")..".") return nil end local ok_sql, sqlite3 = pcall(require, "sqlite3") if not ok_sql then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] sqlite3 library unavailable.") return nil end local db = sqlite3.open(path) if not db then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] could not open the mapper database.") return nil end local idx = build_ref_index() local byItem, missing, total, noitem = {}, {}, 0, 0 for row in db:nrows([[ SELECT e.dir AS cmd, e.touid AS t, r.name AS nm, r.area AS ar FROM exits e LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.uid = e.touid WHERE e.fromuid IN ('*','**') ]]) do total = total + 1 local ref = extract_ref(row.cmd) if not ref then noitem = noitem + 1 else local entry = { ref = ref, nm = row.nm or "?", t = tostring(row.t), ar = row.ar or "?" } local id = resolve_ref(ref, idx) if not id then missing[#missing+1] = entry else byItem[id] = byItem[id] or {}; table.insert(byItem[id], entry) end end end db:close() return { byItem = byItem, missing = missing, total = total, noitem = noitem } end
local function load_portal_refs(only_missing) local path, why = get_db_path() if not path then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] "..esc(why or "no mapper db")..".") return {} end local ok_sql, sqlite3 = pcall(require, "sqlite3") if not ok_sql then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] sqlite3 library unavailable.") return {} end local db = sqlite3.open(path) if not db then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] could not open the mapper database.") return {} end local check = only_missing and make_cataloged_checker() or nil local list, seen = {}, {} for row in db:nrows("SELECT dir FROM exits WHERE fromuid IN ('*','**')") do local ref, container = extract_ref(row.dir) local bag = (pd_bag ~= "" and pd_bag) or container if ref and bag and not seen[ref] then seen[ref] = true if (not check) or (not check(ref)) then list[#list+1] = { ref = ref, container = bag } end end end db:close() return list end
function pd_scan_finish_pass() if scan_mode == "missing" then local remaining = load_portal_refs(true) if #remaining > 0 and #remaining < scan_pass_start then scan_pass_start = #remaining scan_queue = remaining scan_active = true echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Pass done — "..C.num..#remaining..C.hdr.." still missing, retrying...") pd_scan_step() return end scan_mode = nil echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan complete. "..C.num..#remaining..C.hdr.." still missing" ..((#remaining > 0) and (C.hdr.." (no progress last pass — "..C.ok.."portaldex missing"..C.hdr.." to inspect)") or "")..".") else echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan complete.") end pd_summary() end
function pd_scan_step() if not scan_active then return end local item = table.remove(scan_queue, 1) if not item then scan_active = false; pd_scan_finish_pass(); return end pd_scan_current_ref = (item.ref or ""):lower() Send("take " .. item.ref .. " " .. item.container) Send("id " .. item.ref) Send("put " .. item.ref .. " " .. item.container) DoAfterSpecial(pd_speed, "pd_scan_step()", 12) end
function pd_scan(name, line, wc) local arg = ((wc and wc[1]) or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$",""):lower()
if arg == "stop" then if scan_active then scan_active = false echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan paused — "..C.num..#scan_queue..C.hdr.." left. " ..C.ok.."portaldex scan"..C.hdr.." to resume, "..C.ok.."portaldex scan restart"..C.hdr.." to start over.") else echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] No scan running.") end return end if scan_active then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scan already running. "..C.ok.."portaldex scan stop"..C.hdr.." to pause.") return end
if arg == "missing" then scan_queue = load_portal_refs(true) if #scan_queue == 0 then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] No missing portals to scan.") return end scan_mode = "missing"; scan_pass_start = #scan_queue echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scanning "..C.num..#scan_queue..C.hdr.." MISSING portals (auto-repeats until done). "..C.ok.."portaldex scan stop"..C.hdr.." to pause.") scan_active = true; pd_scan_step() return end
scan_mode = nil if arg == "restart" then scan_queue = {} end
if #scan_queue > 0 then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Resuming scan — "..C.num..#scan_queue..C.hdr.." left. "..C.ok.."portaldex scan stop"..C.hdr.." to pause.") else scan_queue = load_portal_refs() if #scan_queue == 0 then echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Found no take/get portal commands in the mapper to scan.") return end echo(C.hdr.."[PortalDex] Scanning "..C.num..#scan_queue..C.hdr.." saved portals (take/id/put, ~"..pd_speed.."s each). "..C.ok.."portaldex scan stop"..C.hdr.." to pause.") end scan_active = true pd_scan_step() end
function pd_missing() local x = cross_reference() if not x then return end local present, uniq = 0, tcount(x.byItem) for _, lst in pairs(x.byItem) do present = present + #lst end table.sort(x.missing, function(a,b) return (a.ar.." "..a.nm) < (b.ar.." "..b.nm) end) echo(C.hdr.."========== "..C.num.."PortalDex vs mapper"..C.hdr.." ==========") echo(C.hdr.."Mapper portals : "..C.num..x.total) echo(C.hdr.."Matched : "..C.num..present..C.hdr.." ("..C.num..uniq..C.hdr.." unique items)") echo(C.hdr.."Missing : "..C.num..#x.missing) echo(C.hdr.."Recall/home : "..C.num..x.noitem..C.hdr.." (no take command — not bag items)") if #x.missing > 0 then echo(C.hdr.."--- missing (run "..C.ok.."portaldex scan missing"..C.hdr.." to fetch these) ---") for _, m in ipairs(x.missing) do echo(C.bad.." miss "..C.val..esc(m.nm).." "..C.num.."["..m.t.."]"..C.hdr.." ("..C.val..esc(m.ar)..C.hdr..") ref: "..C.ok..esc(m.ref)) end else echo(C.ok.."Nothing missing!") end end
-- ========================================================================= -- =================== PATHING (the original PortalValue) ================ -- =========================================================================
pv_history = pv_history or {} pv_debug = pv_debug or false
local function save_history() SetVariable("history", serialize.save_simple(pv_history)) end
-- Classify a portal command using the IN-MEMORY catalog. Returns: -- typer(cmd) -> ptype or nil ; has_chaos ; has_golden (nil if catalog empty) local function pv_portal_typer() if next(catalog) == nil then return nil end local idx = build_ref_index() local has_chaos, has_golden = false, false for _, e in pairs(catalog) do if e.ptype == "chaos" then has_chaos = true elseif e.ptype == "golden chaos" then has_golden = true end end local typer = function(cmd) local ref = extract_ref(cmd) if not ref then return nil end local id = resolve_ref(ref, idx) return (id and catalog[id]) and catalog[id].ptype or nil end return typer, has_chaos, has_golden end
local function pv_show_record(r, with_header) if with_header then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "=================== " .. C.num .. "PortalValue" .. C.hdr .. " ===================") end pv_echo(C.hdr .. "This room : " .. C.val .. esc(r.newname) .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.newuid) .. "] " .. C.hdr .. "(" .. C.val .. esc(r.area) .. C.hdr .. ")") local areanote = "" if r.same_area == false then areanote = C.hdr .. " (in " .. C.val .. esc(r.parea or "?") .. C.hdr .. ")" end pv_echo(C.hdr .. "From portal : " .. C.val .. esc(r.pname) .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.puid) .. "]" .. areanote) pv_echo(C.hdr .. " command : " .. C.ok .. esc(r.pcmd) .. " " .. C.hdr .. "(lvl " .. C.num .. esc(r.plevel) .. C.hdr .. ")") pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Speedwalk : " .. C.ok .. (r.sw ~= "" and esc(r.sw) or "(adjacent)")) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Movements : " .. C.num .. r.moves .. C.hdr .. " walk + " .. C.num .. "1" .. C.hdr .. " portal = " .. C.num .. (r.moves + 1)) if not r.has_chaos then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No normals : " .. C.bad .. "need to run portaldex scan") elseif r.nn_moves then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No normals : " .. C.num .. r.nn_moves .. C.hdr .. " walk + " .. C.num .. "1" .. C.hdr .. " portal = " .. C.num .. (r.nn_moves + 1) .. C.hdr .. " from " .. C.val .. esc(r.nn_pname or "?") .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.nn_puid or "?") .. "]") else pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No normals : " .. C.val .. "(none reachable)") end if not (r.has_chaos and r.has_golden) then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No chaos : " .. C.bad .. "need to run portaldex scan") elseif r.nc_moves then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No chaos : " .. C.num .. r.nc_moves .. C.hdr .. " walk + " .. C.num .. "1" .. C.hdr .. " portal = " .. C.num .. (r.nc_moves + 1) .. C.hdr .. " from " .. C.val .. esc(r.nc_pname or "?") .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.nc_puid or "?") .. "]") else pv_echo(C.hdr .. "No chaos : " .. C.val .. "(none reachable)") end pv_echo(recall_line(r.recall_rooms, r.recall_sw, r.recall_msg)) if r.have_here then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "PS : " .. C.val .. "You already have a portal here!") end end
local function compute_for_room(T, channel) T = tostring(T)
local dbpath, why = get_db_path() if not dbpath then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] " .. esc(why or "could not locate the mapper database") .. ". Type " .. C.ok .. "pvcheck" .. C.hdr .. " for details.") return end local ok_sql, sqlite3 = pcall(require, "sqlite3") if not ok_sql then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] sqlite3 library unavailable.") return end local db = sqlite3.open(dbpath) if not db then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Could not open the mapper database.") return end
local area, tname for row in db:nrows(string.format("SELECT area, name FROM rooms WHERE uid=%s", q(T))) do area = row.area; tname = row.name end if not area then db:close() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Landing room " .. C.num .. esc(T) .. C.hdr .. " isn't mapped yet, so I can't compute a path.") return end
local have_portal_here = false for _ in db:nrows(string.format( "SELECT 1 AS x FROM exits WHERE fromuid IN ('*','**') AND touid=%s LIMIT 1", q(T))) do have_portal_here = true end
local radj = {} for row in db:nrows("SELECT fromuid AS f, touid AS t, dir AS d FROM exits WHERE fromuid NOT IN ('*','**')") do local t = tostring(row.t) local bucket = radj[t] if not bucket then bucket = {}; radj[t] = bucket end bucket[#bucket+1] = { from = tostring(row.f), dir = row.d } end
local portals = {} for row in db:nrows([[ SELECT e.touid AS t, e.dir AS d, e.level AS lv, r.name AS nm, r.area AS ar FROM exits e JOIN rooms r ON r.uid = e.touid WHERE e.fromuid IN ('*','**') ]]) do portals[#portals+1] = { uid = tostring(row.t), cmd = row.d, level = row.lv, name = row.nm, area = row.ar } end
local recall_uid for row in db:nrows("SELECT touid AS t, dir AS d FROM exits WHERE fromuid='**'") do if not recall_uid then recall_uid = tostring(row.t) end if row.d and tostring(row.d):lower():find("recall") then recall_uid = tostring(row.t); break end end db:close()
local dist = { [T] = 0 } local fwd = {} local queue, head = { T }, 1 while head <= #queue do local cur = queue[head]; head = head + 1 local d0 = dist[cur] local preds = radj[cur] if preds then for _, pe in ipairs(preds) do local p = pe.from if dist[p] == nil then dist[p] = d0 + 1 fwd[p] = { dir = pe.dir, nxt = cur } queue[#queue+1] = p end end end end
local function path_dirs(start) local dirs, node = {}, start while node ~= T do local step = fwd[node] if not step then return nil end dirs[#dirs+1] = step.dir node = step.nxt end return dirs end
local recall_rooms, recall_sw, recall_msg if not recall_uid then recall_msg = "no 'recall' portal saved in the mapper" elseif recall_uid == T then recall_rooms, recall_sw = 0, "" elseif dist[recall_uid] == nil then recall_msg = "no known no-portal walk from recall yet" else recall_sw, recall_rooms = build_speedwalk(path_dirs(recall_uid)) end
local typer, has_chaos, has_golden = pv_portal_typer() local best, best_nn, best_noch for _, pt in ipairs(portals) do if pt.uid ~= T and dist[pt.uid] ~= nil then local d = dist[pt.uid] if (not best) or d < best.d or (d == best.d and pt.area == area and best.portal.area ~= area) then best = { d = d, portal = pt } end local ty = typer and typer(pt.cmd) or nil if ty ~= "chaos" then if (not best_nn) or d < best_nn.d or (d == best_nn.d and pt.area == area and best_nn.portal.area ~= area) then best_nn = { d = d, portal = pt } end end if ty ~= "chaos" and ty ~= "golden chaos" then if (not best_noch) or d < best_noch.d or (d == best_noch.d and pt.area == area and best_noch.portal.area ~= area) then best_noch = { d = d, portal = pt } end end end end
if not best then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] No saved portal has a known walking path to " .. C.val .. esc(tname or "?") .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(T) .. "]" .. C.hdr .. " yet. (Explore the connecting rooms, or save a nearby portal.)") pv_echo(recall_line(recall_rooms, recall_sw, recall_msg)) if have_portal_here then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "PS : " .. C.val .. "You already have a portal here!") end return end
local sw, walkmoves = build_speedwalk(path_dirs(best.portal.uid))
local nn_moves, nn_pname, nn_puid if best_nn then _, nn_moves = build_speedwalk(path_dirs(best_nn.portal.uid)) nn_pname = best_nn.portal.name; nn_puid = best_nn.portal.uid end local nc_moves, nc_pname, nc_puid if best_noch then _, nc_moves = build_speedwalk(path_dirs(best_noch.portal.uid)) nc_pname = best_noch.portal.name; nc_puid = best_noch.portal.uid end
local rec = { time = os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M"), area = area, newname = tname or "?", newuid = T, pname = best.portal.name or "?", puid = best.portal.uid, parea = best.portal.area or "?", same_area = (best.portal.area == area), pcmd = best.portal.cmd or "?", plevel = tostring(best.portal.level or 0), sw = sw, moves = walkmoves, recall_rooms = recall_rooms, recall_sw = recall_sw, recall_msg = recall_msg, have_here = have_portal_here, has_chaos = has_chaos or false, has_golden = has_golden or false, nn_moves = nn_moves, nn_pname = nn_pname, nn_puid = nn_puid, nc_moves = nc_moves, nc_pname = nc_pname, nc_puid = nc_puid, } table.insert(pv_history, rec) save_history()
if channel then local recall_disp = (recall_rooms ~= nil) and tostring(recall_rooms) or "N/A" local nn_disp = (has_chaos and nn_moves) and tostring(nn_moves + 1) or "N/A" local nc_disp = (has_chaos and has_golden and nc_moves) and tostring(nc_moves + 1) or "N/A" local summary = C.val .. esc(area) .. " " .. esc(tname or "?") .. C.hdr .. " (" .. C.num .. T .. C.hdr .. "): [" .. C.num .. (walkmoves + 1) .. C.hdr .. " movements from " .. C.val .. esc(best.portal.area or "?") .. " " .. esc(best.portal.name or "?") .. C.hdr .. " (" .. C.num .. best.portal.uid .. C.hdr .. ")] [" .. C.num .. nn_disp .. C.hdr .. " no normals] [" .. C.num .. nc_disp .. C.hdr .. " no chaos] [" .. C.num .. recall_disp .. C.hdr .. " portaless movements from recall" .. C.hdr .. "]" Send(channel .. " " .. summary) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Sent summary to " .. C.val .. esc(channel) .. C.hdr .. "." .. (have_portal_here and (C.hdr .. " (You already have a portal here!)") or "")) return end
pv_show_record(rec, true) end
local function process_current_room(channel) local _, data = CallPlugin(GMCP_ID, "gmcpval", "room.info") local room pcall(function() room = assert(loadstring("return " .. (data or "nil")))() end) if type(room) ~= "table" or not room.num then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Couldn't read the current room from GMCP (try LOOK first).") return end compute_for_room(tostring(room.num), channel) end
-- ===== pathing alias entry points =====
function pv_test() process_current_room() end
function pv_channel(name, line, wc) local channel = (wc[1] or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if channel == "" then process_current_room() else process_current_room(channel) end end
function pv_show_history() if #pv_history == 0 then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] History is empty.") return end pv_echo(C.hdr .. "========= " .. C.num .. "PortalValue history (" .. #pv_history .. ")" .. C.hdr .. " =========") for i, r in ipairs(pv_history) do local pnote = (r.same_area == false) and (C.hdr .. " (in " .. C.val .. esc(r.parea or "?") .. C.hdr .. ")") or "" local rnote = r.recall_rooms and (C.hdr .. " recall " .. C.num .. r.recall_rooms .. C.hdr .. "r") or "" pv_echo(C.hdr .. string.format("%2d. ", i) .. C.val .. esc(r.newname) .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.newuid) .. "] " .. C.hdr .. "<- " .. C.val .. esc(r.pname) .. " " .. C.num .. "[" .. esc(r.puid) .. "]" .. pnote) pv_echo(" " .. C.ok .. (r.sw ~= "" and esc(r.sw) or "(adjacent)") .. C.hdr .. " (" .. C.num .. r.moves .. "+1" .. C.hdr .. " moves, " .. C.val .. esc(r.area) .. C.hdr .. ", " .. esc(r.time) .. ")" .. rnote) end end
function pv_purge() pv_history = {} save_history() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] History cleared.") end
function pv_toggle_debug() pv_debug = not pv_debug pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Debug " .. C.num .. (pv_debug and "ON" or "OFF") .. C.hdr .. ".") end
function pv_check() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "=================== " .. C.num .. "PortalValue check" .. C.hdr .. " ===================") local has_mapper = IsPluginInstalled(MAPPER_ID) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Mapper plugin : " .. (has_mapper and (C.ok .. "found") or (C.bad .. "NOT installed"))) local has_gmcp = IsPluginInstalled(GMCP_ID) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "GMCP handler : " .. (has_gmcp and (C.ok .. "found") or (C.bad .. "NOT installed"))) local path, why = get_db_path() if not path then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Database : " .. C.bad .. esc(why or "not found")) pv_echo(C.bad .. "Not ready. Make sure the Aardwolf mapper is installed and you have") pv_echo(C.bad .. "looked at a room at least once so the mapper has built its database.") return end pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Database : " .. C.ok .. esc(path)) local ok_sql, sqlite3 = pcall(require, "sqlite3") if not ok_sql then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "SQLite : " .. C.bad .. "library unavailable") return end local db = sqlite3.open(path) if not db then pv_echo(C.hdr .. "SQLite : " .. C.bad .. "could not open the database") return end local nrooms, nportals = 0, 0 for row in db:nrows("SELECT count(*) AS c FROM rooms") do nrooms = row.c end for row in db:nrows("SELECT count(*) AS c FROM exits WHERE fromuid IN ('*','**')") do nportals = row.c end db:close() local _, ncat = count_types() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Rooms mapped : " .. C.num .. nrooms) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Saved portals : " .. C.num .. nportals) pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Catalogued : " .. C.num .. ncat) if nportals == 0 then pv_echo(C.ok .. "Ready, " .. C.hdr .. "but you have no saved mapper portals yet (add with 'mapper portal <command>').") else pv_echo(C.ok .. "Ready. Stand in a room and type " .. C.val .. "pv" .. C.ok .. ".") end end
-- combined help (both "portalvalue help" and "portaldex help" land here) function pv_help_all() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "=================== " .. C.num .. "PortalValue " .. C.val .. "3.0" .. C.hdr .. " ===================") pv_echo(C.val .. "Find the nearest portal to walk from, and catalog your portals by type.") pv_echo(C.hdr .. "-- pathing --") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " pv " .. C.val .. "- nearest portal + speedwalk to your room") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " pv <channel> " .. C.val .. "- post a one-line summary to a channel (e.g. pv spo)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portalvaluehistory " .. C.val .. "- list past results") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portalvaluepurge " .. C.val .. "- clear history") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " pvcheck " .. C.val .. "- verify mapper / database setup") pv_echo(C.hdr .. "-- catalog --") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex " .. C.val .. "- catalog summary (counts by type)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex list [t] " .. C.val .. "- list catalogued portals (optional filter)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex scan " .. C.val .. "- id saved portals (also: scan stop/restart/missing)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex missing " .. C.val .. "- mapper portals not yet catalogued") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex bag <kw> " .. C.val .. "- set portal container keyword (used by scan)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex auto on|off " .. C.val .. "- catalog-as-you-go toggle") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex speed <s> " .. C.val .. "- scan pacing (seconds per portal)") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex remove <id|name> " .. C.val .. "- remove one portal from the catalog") pv_echo(C.hdr .. " portaldex clear " .. C.val .. "- wipe the catalog") pv_echo(C.hdr .. "Portals also catalog automatically whenever you " .. C.ok .. "id" .. C.hdr .. " one.") pv_echo(C.bad .. "Scan uses the LAST item id/keyword in each mapper portal command.") end
-- ===== lifecycle (does both halves) =====
function OnPluginInstall() -- catalog (own file) + one-time migration from the old PortalDex plugin variable pd_load() if next(catalog) == nil then local saved = GetVariable("catalog") if saved and saved ~= "" then local ok, t = pcall(function() return assert(loadstring("return "..saved))() end) if ok and type(t) == "table" then catalog = t; pd_save() end end end -- pv history (plugin state) local saved = GetVariable("history") if saved and saved ~= "" then local ok, t = pcall(function() return assert(loadstring("return " .. saved))() end) pv_history = (ok and type(t) == "table") and t or {} else pv_history = {} end local _, total = count_types() pv_echo(C.hdr .. "[PortalValue] Loaded v3.0. " .. C.num .. #pv_history .. C.hdr .. " result(s), " .. C.num .. total .. C.hdr .. " portal(s) cataloged (" .. (pd_auto and (C.ok .. "auto ON") or (C.bad .. "auto OFF")) .. C.hdr .. "). Type " .. C.ok .. "portalvalue help" .. C.hdr .. ".") DoAfterSpecial(2, "pv_check()", 12) end
function OnPluginSaveState() pd_save() save_history() end
